metadata.name: Load Aircraft with Unit Load Devices (ULDs)

description: Ramp agents must load several ULDs (standardized cargo containers) into the hold of a wide-body aircraft.

nodes.task_description: Use a cargo loader to lift the ULDs to the height of the aircraft's cargo door.

expected_outcome.value: Agent operates the cargo loader correctly.

nodes.task_description: Push the ULDs into the hold and move them into their designated positions using the aircraft's internal power drive units.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly positions the ULDs inside the hold.

nodes.task_description: Engage the floor locks to secure the ULDs in place for the flight.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms all ULDs are locked and secure.
